name: SPR-3A "Press"
description: The Press scales ship-component fabrication to a dual-laser SLM (selective laser melting) system with a 6 m × 6 m × 4 m build chamber. Twin 8 kW ytterbium fibre lasers interrogate the powder bed in alternating quadrants, enabling near-continuous operation. The process supports Inconel, Haynes alloys, and oxide dispersion-strengthened steels needed for high-temperature thruster components and reactor internals. Post-print heat treatment furnaces and an in-situ metrology arm ensure dimensional accuracy to 50 µm. Tier-3 reactors, generators, and ISRU heat exchangers are within the machine's operating envelope.
